drill: REAL-1.1 — real-answer end-to-end value-loop proof: /note → retrieval → grounded-answer round-trip with real OpenAI embeddings (D-024) + real OpenAI chat (D-037) (D-073 prep / REAL-1.1 capture)

metadata.environment: real backend — STORAGE_BACKEND=postgres, EMBEDDING_BACKEND=openai, EMBEDDING_MODEL=text-embedding-3-large, EMBEDDING_DIMENSION=3072, CHAT_BACKEND=openai, CHAT_MODEL=gpt-4.1; OP-1 migrations applied; OP-2 bounded retry/backoff active at defaults; webhook secret set
metadata.notes: Live operator evidence for the real-answer end-to-end value-loop proof. Credential-bearing values are replaced by <REDACTED>; structural outcomes are preserved verbatim. A prior mock-backend preflight attempt was rejected and excluded from closure evidence; this artifact records the isolated real-backend run on community_id 5252525201.

Nora practiced three quiet piano songs before bedtime.
